message: fix: stabilize cache refresh + extension e2e

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@

 import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'preact/hooks'

 import { getOverlayRoot } from '../../ui/portal'

-import type { SummaryLength } from '@steipete/summarize-core'

 type SidepanelPickerState = {
   scheme: ColorScheme
@@ -59,7 +59,11 @@ const lengthItems: LengthItem[] = [
   { value: 'long', label: 'Long', tooltip: formatLengthTooltip('long') },
   { value: 'xl', label: 'XL', tooltip: formatLengthTooltip('xl') },
   { value: 'xxl', label: 'XXL', tooltip: formatLengthTooltip('xxl') },

 ]

@@ -258,7 +258,11 @@ export const fetchTranscript = async (
   return {
     text: null,
     source: 'unavailable',
-    metadata: { provider: 'youtube', reason: 'no_transcript_available', ...(durationMetadata ?? {}) },
+    metadata: {
+      provider: 'youtube',
+      reason: 'no_transcript_available',
+      ...(durationMetadata ?? {}),
+    },
     attemptedProviders,
     notes: notes.length > 0 ? notes.join('; ') : null,
   }
